description_long: This object is a handheld flashlight with a cylindrical, ribbed handle and a slightly wider head housing the lamp. The body is predominantly matte black, with a textured grip section for secure handling. The head features a transparent lens covering the light source, and there is a visible button or switch on the side for operation. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on functionality and durability. The flashlight appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely aluminum, with some plastic or rubber components for the lens and switch. Its compact size and robust build make it suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or emergency situations.
description: A matte black handheld flashlight with a ribbed grip, a clear lens at the head, and a side switch for operation. The design is functional and robust, suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, ribbed handle, and the head with a visible switch.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular lens and the head of the flashlight.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the ribbed handle and the head, with the switch less visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the handle and the cylindrical shape.
